frame_analyses.technique_notes: Proper instrument technique for intracorporeal knot tying

frame_analyses.technique_notes: Demonstrating proper hand switching technique between throws

drain_assessment.assessment_note: Perfect closure of drain slit with no gaps visible

technique_summary: This is an instructional video demonstrating perfect FLS Task 5 technique rather than a timed performance. All elements are executed flawlessly with proper surgeon's knot, hand switching, and precise suture placement.
improvement_suggestions: This is a demonstration video showing ideal technique
No improvements needed for this instructional content
strengths: Perfect demonstration of surgeon's knot technique
Complete closure of Penrose drain slit
